description: Unvelied at the 2014 Pebble Beach Concours d'Elegance, where all things bespoke go, Saleen became the first people to offer a complete tuning kit for the Model S P85. The car was more aerodynamic, a little quicker from messing with the gear ratios, and had a pretty ingenius idea: amplifying the alien-like sounds the electric motors make in place of a traditional engine roar.
creator: Keanny
